---
title: "When is a family of random variables shift-representable?"
format: html
---

```{r}
plgamma <- function(x, shape, rate) {
  pgamma(exp(x), shape = shape, rate = rate)
}
```

```{r}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
x <- seq(0, 5, 0.01)
p <- c(0.3, 0.7)
pcols <- c("blue", "darkgreen")

# Panel 1: Gamma CDFs
plot(x, pgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 3), type = "l", ylab = "Pr(X <= x)", main = "Gamma CDFs")
lines(x, pgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 2), col = "red")
legend(
  "topleft", 
  legend = c(expression(X[1] %~% Gamma(5, 3)), expression(X[2] %~% Gamma(5, 2))), 
  col = c("black", "red"), lty = 1
)
for (i in seq_along(p)) {
  qx1 <- qgamma(p[i], shape = 5, rate = 3)
  qx2 <- qgamma(p[i], shape = 5, rate = 2)
  points(c(qx1, qx2), c(p[i], p[i]), pch = 19, col = pcols[i])
  segments(qx1, p[i], qx2, p[i], lty = 2, col = pcols[i])
  segments(qx1, 0, qx1, p[i], lty = 3, col = pcols[i])
  segments(qx2, 0, qx2, p[i], lty = 3, col = pcols[i])
}


# Panel 2: LogGamma CDFs
y <- seq(-1, 2, 0.01)
plot(
  y, plgamma(y, shape = 5, rate = 3), type = "l", ylab = "Pr(Y <= y)", xlab = "y = log(x)", 
  main = "LogGamma CDFs"
)
lines(y, plgamma(y, shape = 5, rate = 2), col = "red")
legend(
  "topleft", 
  legend = c(expression(Y[1] == log(X[1])), expression(Y[2] == log(X[2]))), 
  col = c("black", "red"), lty = 1
)
for (i in seq_along(p)) {
  qy1 <- log(qgamma(p[i], shape = 5, rate = 3))
  qy2 <- log(qgamma(p[i], shape = 5, rate = 2))
  points(c(qy1, qy2), c(p[i], p[i]), pch = 19, col = pcols[i])
  segments(qy1, p[i], qy2, p[i], lty = 2, col = pcols[i])
  segments(qy1, 0, qy1, p[i], lty = 3, col = pcols[i])
  segments(qy2, 0, qy2, p[i], lty = 3, col = pcols[i])
}
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
```

```{r}
# Commutativity of transport maps
# F_1^{-1} ∘ F_2 ∘ F_1^{-1} ∘ F_3 = F_1^{-1} ∘ F_3 ∘ F_1^{-1} ∘ F_2

x <- seq(0, 8, 0.01)
x0 <- 4  # starting x value

# Distribution functions
F1 <- function(x) pgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 3)
F2 <- function(x) pgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 2)
F3 <- function(x) pgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 1.2)
Q1 <- function(p) qgamma(p, shape = 5, rate = 3)

cols <- c("black", "red", "blue")
path_cols <- c("purple", "darkorange")

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

# ---- Panel 1: Gamma CDFs ----
plot(x, F1(x), type = "l", ylab = "Pr(X <= x)", main = "Gamma CDFs (fixed shape, varying rate)\n Shift-representable -> Commutativity of transport maps",
     xlim = c(0, 8))
lines(x, F2(x), col = cols[2])
lines(x, F3(x), col = cols[3])
legend("bottomright",
  legend = c(expression(F[1]: X[1] %~% Gamma(5, 3)),
             expression(F[2]: X[2] %~% Gamma(5, 2)),
             expression(F[3]: X[3] %~% Gamma(5, 1.2))),
  col = cols, lty = 1, cex = 0.8, y.intersp = 1.5
)

# Path 1 (LHS): F_1^{-1} ∘ F_2 ∘ F_1^{-1} ∘ F_3
# Evaluation order: x0 -> F_3 -> Q1 -> F_2 -> Q1
a1 <- F3(x0)     # probability on F3 curve at x0
b1 <- Q1(a1)     # x-value on F1 curve at that probability
c1 <- F2(b1)     # probability on F2 curve at b1
d1 <- Q1(c1)     # x-value on F1 curve at that probability (final)

# Segments: vertical to F3, horizontal to F1, vertical to F2, horizontal to F1
segments(x0, 0, x0, a1, col = path_cols[1], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(x0, a1, b1, a1, col = path_cols[1], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(b1, a1, b1, c1, col = path_cols[1], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(b1, c1, d1, c1, col = path_cols[1], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(d1, c1, d1, 0, col = path_cols[1], lty = 3, lwd = 1)
points(c(x0, b1, b1, d1), c(a1, a1, c1, c1), pch = 19, col = path_cols[1], cex = 1.2)
text(x0, a1, "A", pos = 4, col = path_cols[1], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(b1, a1, "B", pos = 2, col = path_cols[1], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(b1, c1, "C", pos = 1, col = path_cols[1], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(d1, c1, "D", pos = 3, col = path_cols[1], cex = 0.8, font = 2)

# Path 2 (RHS): F_1^{-1} ∘ F_3 ∘ F_1^{-1} ∘ F_2
# Evaluation order: x0 -> F_2 -> Q1 -> F_3 -> Q1
a2 <- F2(x0)     # probability on F2 curve at x0
b2 <- Q1(a2)     # x-value on F1 curve at that probability
c2 <- F3(b2)     # probability on F3 curve at b2
d2 <- Q1(c2)     # x-value on F1 curve at that probability (final)

# Segments: vertical to F2, horizontal to F1, vertical to F3, horizontal to F1
segments(x0, 0, x0, a2, col = path_cols[2], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(x0, a2, b2, a2, col = path_cols[2], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(b2, a2, b2, c2, col = path_cols[2], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(b2, c2, d2, c2, col = path_cols[2], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(d2, c2, d2, 0, col = path_cols[2], lty = 3, lwd = 1)
points(c(x0, b2, b2, d2), c(a2, a2, c2, c2), pch = 19, col = path_cols[2], cex = 1.2)
text(x0, a2, "A'", pos = 3, col = path_cols[2], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(b2, a2, "B'", pos = 2, col = path_cols[2], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(b2, c2, "C'", pos = 4, col = path_cols[2], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(d2, c2, "D'", pos = 2, col = path_cols[2], cex = 0.8, font = 2)

# Mark start and common endpoint on x-axis
points(x0, 0, pch = 17, col = "black", cex = 1.5)
text(x0, 0, expression(x[0]), pos = 1, cex = 0.8, font = 2)
points(d1, 0, pch = 4, col = "black", cex = 2, lwd = 3)
text(d1, 0, expression(x*"*"), pos = 1, cex = 0.8, font = 2)

legend("right",
  legend = c(expression(F[1]^{-1} %.% F[2] %.% F[1]^{-1} %.% F[3]),
             expression(F[1]^{-1} %.% F[3] %.% F[1]^{-1} %.% F[2])),
  col = path_cols, lty = 2, lwd = 1.5, cex = 0.8, y.intersp = 1.5, title = "Paths"
)

# ---- Panel 2: LogGamma CDFs ----
x <- seq(-3, 6, 0.01)
x0 <- 2  # starting x value

# Distribution functions
F1 <- function(x) pnorm(x, mean = 0, sd = 1)
F2 <- function(x) pnorm(x, mean = 1, sd = 1.25)
F3 <- function(x) pnorm(x, mean = 2, sd = 1.25)
Q1 <- function(p) qnorm(p, mean = 0, sd = 1)

cols <- c("black", "red", "blue")
path_cols <- c("purple", "darkorange")

# ---- Panel 1: Gamma CDFs ----
plot(x, F1(x), type = "l", ylab = "Pr(X <= x)", main = "Normal CDFs, unequal variance\n Not shift-representable -> Transport maps NOT commutative",
     xlim = c(-3, 6))
lines(x, F2(x), col = cols[2])
lines(x, F3(x), col = cols[3])
legend("bottomright",
  legend = c(expression(F[1]: X[1] %~% N(0, 1)),
             expression(F[2]: X[2] %~% N(1, 1.25)),
             expression(F[3]: X[3] %~% N(2, 1.25))),
  col = cols, lty = 1, cex = 0.8, y.intersp = 1.5
)

# Path 1 (LHS): F_1^{-1} ∘ F_2 ∘ F_1^{-1} ∘ F_3
# Evaluation order: x0 -> F_3 -> Q1 -> F_2 -> Q1
a1 <- F3(x0)     # probability on F3 curve at x0
b1 <- Q1(a1)     # x-value on F1 curve at that probability
c1 <- F2(b1)     # probability on F2 curve at b1
d1 <- Q1(c1)     # x-value on F1 curve at that probability (final)

# Segments: vertical to F3, horizontal to F1, vertical to F2, horizontal to F1
segments(x0, 0, x0, a1, col = path_cols[1], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(x0, a1, b1, a1, col = path_cols[1], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(b1, a1, b1, c1, col = path_cols[1], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(b1, c1, d1, c1, col = path_cols[1], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(d1, c1, d1, 0, col = path_cols[1], lty = 3, lwd = 1)
points(c(x0, b1, b1, d1), c(a1, a1, c1, c1), pch = 19, col = path_cols[1], cex = 1.2)
text(x0, a1, "A", pos = 4, col = path_cols[1], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(b1, a1, "B", pos = 2, col = path_cols[1], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(b1, c1, "C", pos = 1, col = path_cols[1], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(d1, c1, "D", pos = 3, col = path_cols[1], cex = 0.8, font = 2)

# Path 2 (RHS): F_1^{-1} ∘ F_3 ∘ F_1^{-1} ∘ F_2
# Evaluation order: x0 -> F_2 -> Q1 -> F_3 -> Q1
a2 <- F2(x0)     # probability on F2 curve at x0
b2 <- Q1(a2)     # x-value on F1 curve at that probability
c2 <- F3(b2)     # probability on F3 curve at b2
d2 <- Q1(c2)     # x-value on F1 curve at that probability (final)

# Segments: vertical to F2, horizontal to F1, vertical to F3, horizontal to F1
segments(x0, 0, x0, a2, col = path_cols[2], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(x0, a2, b2, a2, col = path_cols[2], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(b2, a2, b2, c2, col = path_cols[2], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(b2, c2, d2, c2, col = path_cols[2], lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
segments(d2, c2, d2, 0, col = path_cols[2], lty = 3, lwd = 1)
points(c(x0, b2, b2, d2), c(a2, a2, c2, c2), pch = 19, col = path_cols[2], cex = 1.2)
text(x0, a2, "A'", pos = 3, col = path_cols[2], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(b2, a2, "B'", pos = 2, col = path_cols[2], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(b2, c2, "C'", pos = 4, col = path_cols[2], cex = 0.8, font = 2)
text(d2, c2, "D'", pos = 2, col = path_cols[2], cex = 0.8, font = 2)

# Mark start and common endpoint on x-axis
points(x0, 0, pch = 17, col = "black", cex = 1.5)
text(x0, 0, expression(x[0]), pos = 1, cex = 0.8, font = 2)
points(d1, 0, pch = 4, col = "black", cex = 2, lwd = 3)
text(d1, 0, expression(x*"*"), pos = 1, cex = 0.8, font = 2)

legend("right",
  legend = c(expression(F[1]^{-1} %.% F[2] %.% F[1]^{-1} %.% F[3]),
             expression(F[1]^{-1} %.% F[3] %.% F[1]^{-1} %.% F[2])),
  col = path_cols, lty = 2, lwd = 1.5, cex = 0.8, y.intersp = 1.5, title = "Paths"
)
par(mfrow = c(1,1))
```

```{r}
mu1 <- 0
mu2 <- 0.2
sd1 <- 1
sd2 <- 1.25

x <- seq(-10, 4, 0.01)
plot(x, pnorm(x, mu1, sd1), type = "l")
lines(x, pnorm(x, mu2, sd2), col = "red")

(mu1*sd2 - mu2*sd1)/(sd2-sd1)
d = pnorm(x, mu1, sd1) - pnorm(x, mu2, sd2)
min(d[d<0])
```



```{r}
plot_transformed_uvsd_vector <- function(mu_s_vec = c(0.5, 1.0, 1.5), a = 0.25, b = 1, x_min = -3, x_max = 5, step = 0.01) {
  # Calculate the universal concurrent crossing point
  x_star <- -b / a
  
  # Sequences for untransformed (full range) and transformed (truncated)
  x_untrans <- seq(x_min, x_max, step)
  
  x_start <- max(x_star + step, x_min)
  x_trans <- seq(x_start, x_max, step)
  y_trans <- log(x_trans - x_star)
  
  options(repr.plot.width = 12, repr.plot.height = 10)
  par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
  
  line_colors <- rainbow(length(mu_s_vec))
  
  # --- TOP ROW: Untransformed ---
  
  # 1. Untransformed PDF
  plot(x_untrans, dnorm(x_untrans), type = "l", 
       main = "Untransformed PDF", ylab = "Density", xlab = "x", ylim = c(0, 0.5))
  for (i in seq_along(mu_s_vec)) {
    mu_s <- mu_s_vec[i]
    sd_s <- a * mu_s + b
    lines(x_untrans, dnorm(x_untrans, mean = mu_s, sd = sd_s), col = line_colors[i])
  }
  
  # 2. Untransformed CDF
  plot(x_untrans, pnorm(x_untrans), type = "l", 
       main = "Untransformed CDF", ylab = "Cumulative Probability", xlab = "x")
  for (i in seq_along(mu_s_vec)) {
    mu_s <- mu_s_vec[i]
    sd_s <- a * mu_s + b
    lines(x_untrans, pnorm(x_untrans, mean = mu_s, sd = sd_s), col = line_colors[i])
  }
  
  # --- BOTTOM ROW: Transformed ---
  
  # 3. Transformed PDF
  plot(y_trans, exp(y_trans) * dnorm(x_trans), type = "l", 
       main = "Transformed PDF", ylab = "Density", xlab = "y")
  for (i in seq_along(mu_s_vec)) {
    mu_s <- mu_s_vec[i]
    sd_s <- a * mu_s + b
    lines(y_trans, exp(y_trans) * dnorm(x_trans, mean = mu_s, sd = sd_s), col = line_colors[i])
  }
  
  # 4. Transformed CDF
  plot(y_trans, pnorm(x_trans), type = "l", 
       main = "Transformed CDF", ylab = "Cumulative Probability", xlab = "y")
  for (i in seq_along(mu_s_vec)) {
    mu_s <- mu_s_vec[i]
    sd_s <- a * mu_s + b
    lines(y_trans, pnorm(x_trans, mean = mu_s, sd = sd_s), col = line_colors[i])
  }
}

plot_transformed_uvsd_vector(a = 0.25)
plot_transformed_uvsd_vector(a = 0.125, x_min = -4)
```
